signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**[1]

This March figure, released around early April 2026, marks the latest confirmed data amid Middle East tensions driving oil volatility, staying near the Bank of Korea's 2% target but signaling contained pressures before energy shocks.[1][4] The Bank of Korea
